description: Artifact gate configuration: defines verification gates for autonomous milestone execution, organized by gate type (per_subversion, checkpoint, half_transition, graduation, summary).

milestone.description: Milestone identifier this gate config applies to

milestone_type.description: Type of milestone for gate template selection

gates.description: Gate definitions organized by gate type

per_subversion.description: Gates that run after every subversion

checkpoint.description: Gates that run at checkpoint intervals

half_transition.description: Gates that run at the midpoint

graduation.description: Gates that run at final completion

summary.description: Gates that run for synthesis/summary documents

description.description: Human-readable description of what this gate validates

path_pattern.description: Glob or template pattern for the artifact path

min_size_bytes.description: Minimum file size in bytes for the artifact to pass

blocking.description: Whether a gate failure blocks continued execution

content_checks.description: Content checks to run against the artifact

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match against file content

description.description: Human-readable description of what this check validates

applies_when.description: Optional condition expression for when this gate applies
